summary: Iteration 29 - Bug fixes testing complete. Both bugs verified as FIXED: 1) Cover image changes now persist and display on public profile page, 2) Notification counters in dashboard sidebar are working with real-time WebSocket sync. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified working.

issues: Cover image shows 'Cover' alt text when image URL is invalid/test URL - this is expected behavior, not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX 1 VERIFIED: ClientProfileUpdate model (line 4565-4577) now includes cover_image field, and /api/client/profile/{user_id}/public endpoint (line 4678) returns cover_image
BUG FIX 2 VERIFIED: useNotificationWebSocket hook imported and integrated in ClientDashboard.js with proper sync logic (lines 159-178) and getNotificationCount function (lines 1003-1060)
WebSocket hook uses HTTP polling on Render.com as fallback since Render doesn't support WebSockets well - good design decision
seed_data_creation: Test cover images created with TEST_ prefix URLs during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bugs from this iteration are fixed and verified: 1) Cover image (banner) changes now persist to database and display on public profile page at /profil/:userId - the ClientProfileUpdate Pydantic model includes cover_image field and the public profile endpoint returns it. 2) Notification counters in ClientDashboard sidebar are working - the useNotificationWebSocket hook is integrated and syncs with local state, getNotificationCount function provides counts for various menu items (messages, friend_requests, orders, deliveries, cart, etc.). The dashboard shows notification badges correctly (e.g., '1' on Mon cash-back, '17' on orders). User ID for test@example.com: c99d11be-d54e-4f09-abd1-05ae34a933cb
